overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a vibrant, sunlit rural landscape toward a village. The character traverses dirt paths and wildflower meadows with mountains visible in the distance, eventually approaching farm buildings and encountering grazing cows.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside dirt path approaching rural village

events.description: character steps off the dirt path into tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through grassy hills with swords on back, heading toward a distant village

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grassy hillside
cluster of large oak trees with dense green foliage
hazy blue mountain range on the horizon
red-tiled roofs of distant village buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a dirt path through open grassy hills. Oak trees line the left side while distant mountains and village rooftops are visible ahead. The character transitions from the path into taller grass around the 6-second mark, continuing toward the settlement under bright midday sun.

agents.ego_description: walking through dense tall grass and wildflowers, approaching the village buildings

entered.detail: field of white daisy-like flowers covering the meadow
tall purple wildflowers scattered in the grass
cluster of village houses with red roofs and stone walls

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dense meadow filled with white and purple wildflowers, the camera advances toward the village. The dirt path disappears behind as the character wades through tall grass. Village buildings become more defined in the mid-distance while the oak trees recede to the far left.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with farm buildings and grazing livestock

events.description: cows come into view grazing in the field near the path

agents.ego_description: approaching the village outskirts, passing close to grazing cows and farm buildings

notable_agents.action: brown cow grazing in the tall grass near the path
black and white cow grazing near the green farmhouse

entered.detail: two-story green painted farmhouse with brown roof and shutters
small stone arch bridge crossing a stream in the village
stone archway entrance to the village center

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the village outskirts, passing a green farmhouse on the left and approaching a stone bridge. Cows graze peacefully in the field beside the path. The distant mountains fade from view as the camera focuses on the village archway and nearby buildings, transitioning from open meadow to the settlement edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, hilly countryside into the outskirts of a rural village. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined with oak trees, with distant mountains and rooftops visible under a bright midday sun. As the character leaves the path, the scene shifts into a dense meadow of white and purple wildflowers where the surrounding hills open up and the trees recede. The camera then advances through the tall grass toward the settlement, where the distant mountains fade from view as the environment transitions into a residential area. Finally, the movement leads past a green farmhouse and grazing cows toward a stone bridge and the village archway.
